schema_notes.fundamental: Dashboard-safe. Never contains price, analyst targets, or valuation. Advisor project reads this.
schema_notes.advisory: Advisor-layer only. Dashboard ignores this namespace. Advisor project overrides with real-time data.
schema_notes.tier_positions: Derived at build time from data.json company arrays. dominance auto-derived: 1 company=Monopoly, 2=Duopoly, 3+ with dominance keyword=Leader, 3+ otherwise=Contested. Rail-mapped tickers use layer_id=Rail-*.
schema_notes.score_history: Parsed from signals.md Research Log at build time. Empty array = not yet parsed.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Ambarella's CVflow SoCs deliver GPU-class AI inference at <20W, making it the default edge AI chip for robotics, ADAS, and computer vision at scale.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q1 FY2028 earnings — watch Hanwha ramp progress and edge AI revenue mix
CVflow 4.0 next-gen architecture timeline announcement
Additional ADAS OEM design-win announcements beyond Hanwha

advisory.bull_summary: CVflow architecture compounds at each generational step; Hanwha $800M+ deal provides multi-year revenue visibility; physical AI era (NVIDIA Isaac) expands edge inference TAM; 4 simultaneous adjacencies confirmed.
advisory.bear_summary: Mobileye OEM incumbency is deep with decades of automotive relationships; TSMC concentration creates geopolitical supply risk; CTO co-founder departure reduces active technical oversight at critical roadmap juncture.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Co-founder-led digital lidar company with a custom SoC architecture, Pentagon Blue UAS approval, and gross margins climbing from 22% to 45% — proof the cost curve is working.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — re-score trigger: watch GM recovery toward 50%+ post-StereoLabs integration
StereoLabs RGB-D + AI perception second product line commercial traction
NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion production vehicle program design wins from qualification

advisory.bull_summary: Digital SoC architecture (2 chips vs. dozens analog) compounds manufacturing cost advantage; Pentagon Blue certification opens defense TAM; NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion qualification embeds Ouster in AV production pipelines; StereoLabs adds multimodal perception platform.
advisory.bear_summary: Balance sheet thin (FH 2/5); StereoLabs integration causing GM step-down from 62% to 46% requires monitoring; co-founder leadership gaps; lidar commoditization risk from China vendors at lower ASPs.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Dual-division micro-cap at the AI data center CPO laser bottleneck and mmWave 5G/defense — early revenue, 64% growing opportunity pipeline, and a critical cash runway constraint that makes execution timing everything.

near_term_catalysts.description: O-Net / Enablence CPO ELS modules — commercial production timeline from March 2026 partnership
Jabil manufacturing ramp — first volume production orders
InP photonics design-win with hyperscaler or Tier-1 transceiver customer
Strategic LiDAR customer high-volume production ramp

advisory.bull_summary: InP laser arrays sit at the CPO bottleneck tier; O-Net/Enablence commercial partnership validates technology; Jabil manufacturing partnership enables hyperscale production; $453M pipeline 64% growing.
advisory.bear_summary: Sub-12-month cash runway with ongoing dilution risk; 31x P/S valuation punishes execution misses; criminal investigation and delayed annual report governance flags; Achilles Capital parent in restructuring creating forced-sale overhang.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Intel's EMIB packaging and 25-year in-house silicon photonics stack is the only IDM-foundry platform that can solve the AI interconnect bottleneck while manufacturing on US soil.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 FY2026 earnings (unconfirmed) — guided $13.8-14.8B rev, $0.20 non-GAAP EPS
Apple preliminary deal converting to firm commitment for Intel US fabs
IFS first major HVM customer commitment beyond Apple (H2 2026-2027)
EMIB-T external customer design win announcement
CHIPS Act grant disbursement milestones

advisory.bull_summary: IFS as US-domiciled TSMC alternative with $15B+ signed lifetime commitments and CHIPS Act backing; EMIB+CPO platform uniquely combines design+foundry+packaging+photonics; Apple preliminary deal as anchor IFS customer.
advisory.bear_summary: Prior CEO Pat Gelsinger missed multiple process node roadmaps; IFS lacks proven HVM customers at scale; Broadcom already shipping CPO in production volume (50K+ units) ahead of Intel; FCF negative through 2026 with $6.5B bridge loan.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: The dominant AI compute platform company; GPU monopoly in model training and inference with a rapidly expanding software moat (CUDA ecosystem) that makes switching nearly impossible.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 FY2027 earnings — primary metric: datacenter revenue growth rate
Blackwell / GB200 NVL72 rack demand updates and Rubin platform ramp
Export control policy changes affecting China and Middle East revenue
Hyperscaler capex guidance from MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META

advisory.bull_summary: CUDA ecosystem lock-in compounds with every AI software release; Blackwell/Rubin demand cycle extends AI capex supercycle into 2028+; software platform (NIM, DGX Cloud) compounds margins; physical AI/robotics opens new TAM layer.
advisory.bear_summary: Export controls on China revenue create recurring ceiling; custom silicon from hyperscalers (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia) threaten long-term share; AMD MI-series gaining inference share at major accounts.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Only US-listed pure-play HBM maker ramping NVIDIA's Vera Rubin supply; structural margin expansion as HBM penetration grows.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q3 FY2025 earnings — guidance on HBM4 ramp and capacity utilization key watch items
NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform ramp H2 2026 — Micron production constrained, pricing power inflection
Next-gen HBM5 design win announcements targeting 2027

advisory.bull_summary: Only US national security-cleared HBM maker; NVIDIA first-mover supply contract; HBM content per GPU rising as context windows expand; hyperscalers diversifying away from sole SK Hynix sourcing.
advisory.bear_summary: Low insider ownership; legacy DRAM/NAND exposure caps multiple re-rating; GPU demand cycle sensitive; potential supply diversification if Korean geopolitical tensions ease.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: $2B NVIDIA partnership on CXL switching + SSD controllers; infrastructure layer for AI memory disaggregation; broad exposure to AI infrastructure.

near_term_catalysts.description: Structera S 30260 CXL switch sample release Q3 2026
First hyperscaler Structera CXL switch design wins H2 2026
Q2 FY2027 earnings — watch AI infrastructure revenue mix vs legacy datacenter

advisory.bull_summary: $2B NVIDIA strategic investment de-risks Structera CXL ecosystem; CXL switching + SSD controllers + NVLink Fusion = multiple converging AI infrastructure tailwinds; 62% gross margin expanding on AI mix.
advisory.bear_summary: Distributed revenue across segments reduces pure-play leverage; Astera Labs has first-mover advantage in memory controllers; CXL ecosystem adoption could delay if hyperscalers prefer proprietary solutions.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Only pure-play CXL memory expansion provider; first hyperscale deployment (Azure) de-risks ecosystem; Nasdaq-100 added May 2026.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — watch Leo CXL revenue run-rate continuation vs. Q1 $308M annualized
Scorpio CXL switch platform ramp H2 2026 — key new revenue vector
Second hyperscaler CXL production deployment beyond Azure announcement

advisory.bull_summary: Only publicly traded pure-play CXL memory expansion company; Azure production deployment de-risks ecosystem chicken-and-egg; Nasdaq-100 inclusion signals institutional recognition; Scorpio switch extends TAM.
advisory.bear_summary: Pre-profitability at FH:2 (operating margin -45%); 51x P/S leaves no room for execution misses; Marvell Structera competing in adjacent CXL switching; CXL adoption timeline could slip.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Full-stack SerDes IP owner that has become the de facto AEC standard inside AI GPU clusters — FY2026 revenue tripled to $1.34B at 68% gross margins, now expanding to optical via Hyperlume.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q1 FY2027 earnings — watch quarterly gross margin sustaining ~67-68%
1.6T AEC product launch and first hyperscaler volume orders (H2 2026)
Hyperlume microLED integration: first product announcement or design win (H1 FY2027)
PCIe retimer revenue ramp — watch % of total revenue

advisory.bull_summary: 1.6T AEC transition triggers full cluster replacement cycle in H2 2026; PCIe retimer TAM over $1B by 2027; Hyperlume opens optical adjacency at 3.2T+; fifth hyperscaler in qualification reducing concentration.
advisory.bear_summary: ~88% revenue from top 3 hyperscalers creates capex-timing concentration risk; Astera Labs competing in retimers; Broadcom and Marvell can bundle competing solutions with switch silicon at scale.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Fabless NAND flash controller pure-play; MonTitan AI SSD ramping five hyperscalers; PCIe Gen5 ASP uplift, +100% growth.

near_term_catalysts.description: MonTitan mass production at 5 cloud customers H2 2026 — volume ramp visible in Q3 earnings
Q2 2026 earnings — guidance $393-411M, validate +100% growth continuation
Next-gen PCIe 6.0 controller sampling 2027

advisory.bull_summary: MonTitan is industry-first AI-optimized SSD controller with 5 simultaneous hyperscaler ramps; founder-led (Wallace Kou 2.5% ownership); fabless leverage drives margin expansion at scale; PCIe Gen5 ASP uplift structural.
advisory.bear_summary: NAND maker in-house controller development (Samsung, SK Hynix) threatens long-term share; NAND commodity cycle risk; customer concentration in hyperscalers; competing Phison designs in same market.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Pure-play memory interface IP (DDR5, HBM4E); 40% RCD market share; zero fab capex, 84% margins, $14B TAM by 2035.

near_term_catalysts.description: DDR5 MRDIMM (next-gen high-density) ramp H2 2026 — RCD royalties accelerate
HBM4E controller licensing deals at major DRAM customers 2027
CXL memory pooling controller ramp 2028+ — new TAM opening

advisory.bull_summary: Pure IP tollbooth: every DDR5 RDIMM server requires a Rambus RCD; 40%+ market share with network effects; 84% gross margin; zero fab capex = FCF machine; HBM4E controller IP licensed industry-wide at all major DRAM makers.
advisory.bear_summary: Customer concentration (Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron); competitor next-gen controller threat; memory cycle downturn reduces DDR5 RCD volume; small scale ($8B market cap) limits institutional float.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: The dominant Ethernet switching platform for hyperscaler AI clusters; EOS software lock-in means every Meta/Microsoft/Google AI build is a recurring Arista order.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — watch AI/cloud revenue mix vs. enterprise; 800G adoption rate
800G adoption acceleration at hyperscalers H2 2026; ASP uplift visible in revenue
1.6T switching product cycle begins 2027; new TAM expansion

advisory.bull_summary: EOS ecosystem lock-in compounds with every AI cluster built; Meta/Microsoft/Google all accelerating AI capex; 400G→800G→1.6T product cycles extend value capture for 5+ years; $1B+ quarterly net income demonstrates exceptional financial leverage.
advisory.bear_summary: InfiniBand resurgence (NVDA Quantum-X) would slow Ethernet adoption; Meta ~15% concentration creates revenue timing risk; Cisco building AI-native networking products; hyperscalers developing custom switch silicon.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: The chip-agnostic picks-and-shovels play on AI data center thermal management — $15B+ backlog, chip-agnostic wins regardless of GPU vendor, and every GPU cluster needs Vertiv.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — watch orders/backlog growth vs. Q4's 152% level; liquid cooling attach rate
Blackwell NVL72 rack ramp H2 2026 — liquid cooling demand surge trigger
Backlog-to-revenue conversion rate vs. Schneider/Eaton (key execution metric)

advisory.bull_summary: Chip-agnostic = wins regardless of who wins the AI chip race; $15B+ backlog (100%+ YoY) provides exceptional revenue visibility; Q4 orders +152% YoY; $1.9B FCF at 115% conversion; every GPU cluster is a mandatory Vertiv order.
advisory.bear_summary: Low insider ownership limits alignment signal; new CFO (Nov 2025) too early to evaluate; Schneider Electric and Eaton compete in every deal; SPAC debt structure; backlog conversion execution risk at $10B+ scale.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: NVIDIA's primary GPU rack ODM with founder 14-15% ownership and liquid-cooling first-mover advantage — discounted by unresolved governance overhang.

near_term_catalysts.description: DOJ investigation resolution — primary multiple re-rating catalyst; resolution = governance overhang lifts
Q4 FY2026 earnings — AI server revenue ramp; watch gross margin trajectory
CFO succession announcement — resolves key governance flag from 2024

advisory.bull_summary: NVIDIA preferred rack-scale ODM; fastest time-to-market on new GPU architectures; founder Liang 14-15% ownership; AI server TAM $30B→$300B+; liquid cooling design leadership; governance discount = potential upside on resolution.
advisory.bear_summary: DOJ investigation ongoing; CFO in succession limbo since 2024; 12% GM limits downside protection; ODM commoditization risk from Dell/HPE; SMCI governance scar tissue suppresses institutional ownership.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: NVIDIA Exemplar Cloud-certified GPU neocloud (fewer than 10 globally) with 85%+ gross margins, $1.45B take-or-pay contracted backlog, and Dell DFS financing that removes dilutive equity risk.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — first fully public quarter; watch $375M ARR ramp progress
Thinking Machines Lab deployment completion — 5,000 NVIDIA B300 GPUs
SPAC lock-up expiry — 43.9M shares unlock (~250% of float); watch insider selling pace
5 new data center locations (in development) — go-live announcements

advisory.bull_summary: NVIDIA Exemplar Cloud certification places BRUN in peer tier with CRWV/Azure/OCI; $1.45B take-or-pay backlog growing 12x in 6 months; Dell DFS $1.44B financing eliminates dilution risk; compliance certifications gate regulated-industry procurement.
advisory.bear_summary: Thinking Machines Lab ~33% of backlog creates concentration risk; Nov 8 lock-up expiry ~43.9M shares is major float supply event; SPAC governance immaturity signals; CoreWeave and hyperscaler competition compressing neocloud pricing.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Digital-native U.S. bank with a national charter; Galileo B2B platform and Financial Services Productivity Loop flywheel driving nine consecutive GAAP-profitable quarters and 30% member growth.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — 10th consecutive GAAP-profitable quarter; watch LPB revenue trajectory and deposit growth
SoFi USD stablecoin launch — loan tokenization and POS crypto payments timeline
Galileo revenue ramp — $1.2B targeted for 2026

advisory.bull_summary: 10 consecutive GAAP-profitable quarters; Financial Services Productivity Loop (75% 30-day second-product adoption) compounds cross-sell; LPB capital-light fee income scales without credit risk; CEO Noto 39 open-market buys and 0 sales over 5 years.
advisory.bear_summary: ~33x 2026E P/E punishes any miss; unsecured personal loan book vulnerable in macro downturn; LPB growth rate-cycle sensitive; competitive pressure from incumbent banks building digital-first products.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: The only vertically integrated launch provider with proven mission cadence outside SpaceX, compounding into a space systems business that serves as the DoD's indispensable second source.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — watch Space Systems revenue mix and Neutron development capex
Neutron reusable rocket development milestone announcements
Additional DoD/NRO mission manifest confirmation

advisory.bull_summary: Only non-SpaceX commercial launcher at proven mission cadence; DoD/NRO indispensable second source with deep mission trust; Space Systems components sold industry-wide as independent revenue stream; Neutron reusable rocket as next compounding growth vector.
advisory.bear_summary: FCF negative (FH 2/5); launch pricing compressed by SpaceX Falcon 9 cost floor; Neutron development capex creates dilution risk; launch market maturity timeline uncertain.
